name: Worksession
summary: Manages a list of models that are being used as reference geometry.

methods.name: FileNameFromRuntimeSerialNumber
methods.summary: Returns the path to the open worksession, or .rws, file. If there is no worksession file open, or the active worksession has not yet been saved, then null is returned.

methods.name: ModelPathFromSerialNumber
methods.summary: Returns the path to a model, used by the worksession, given a reference model serial number

returns.doc: The path to the model if successful, null otherwise.

properties.name: Document
properties.summary: Gets the document that owns this worksession.

properties.name: FileName
properties.summary: Returns the path to the open worksession, or .rws, file. If there is no worksession file open, or the active worksession has not yet been saved, then null is returned.

properties.name: ModelCount
properties.summary: Returns the number of models in the worksession. The active model will included in this count whether or not it has been saved.

properties.name: ModelPaths
properties.summary: Returns the paths to the models used by the worksession. If the active model has not been saved, then it will not be included in the output array.

properties.name: RuntimeSerialNumber
properties.summary: Unique serial number for the worksession while the application is running. This is not a persistent value.
